title: B.Sc Jobs 2026 – Project Technical Support-II and Project Nurse-III
org: Project Technical Support-II and Project Nurse-III
shortInfo: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Technical Support-II and Project Nurse-III. Candidates with MSC, B.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through JIPMER official website jipmer.edu.in.

basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support and Project Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support-II and Project Nurse-III
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Technical Support-II and Project Nurse-III. Candidates with MSC, B.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through JIPMER official website jipmer.edu.in.

application_fee.details: Project Technical Support-II: Maximum 30 years. Project Nurse-III: Maximum 35 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

age_limit.maximum_age: Max 30 years for Project Technical Support-II, Max 35 years for Project Nurse-III
age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for Project Technical Support-II, Max 35 years for Project Nurse-III
age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor degree in clinical research Or Social sciences or Biotechnology; MSC Nursing or B.Sc.(Nursing) with 3 years of experience in Obstetrics and Gynecology.
qualification.details: Project Technical Support-II: Bachelor degree in clinical research Or Social sciences or Biotechnology. Desirable: Experience in working projects/programs. Project Nurse-III: MSC Nursing or B.Sc.(Nursing) with 3 years of experience in Obstetrics and Gynecology. Desirable: Work experience in clinical research projects after nursing course.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Project Technical Support-II and Project Nurse-III

salary_details.salary: Rs. 20,000/- per month + HRA 20% (Project Technical Support-II), Rs. 28000/-Per month+ HRA 20% (Project Nurse-III)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: What are the posts available in this JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment drive is for the positions of Project Technical Support-II and Project Nurse-III.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support-II?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Support-II, candidates need a Bachelor's degree in clinical research, social sciences, or biotechnology.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification for Project Nurse-III?
faq.answer: For Project Nurse-III, candidates must have an MSC Nursing or B.Sc.(Nursing) with at least 3 years of experience in Obstetrics and Gynecology.

faq.question: What is the age limit for Project Technical Support-II?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Technical Support-II is 30 years.

faq.question: What is the age limit for Project Nurse-III?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Nurse-III is 35 years.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on the application and CV, followed by a written test and an interview.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for Project Technical Support-II?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Technical Support-II is Rs. 20,000/- per month plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for Project Nurse-III?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Nurse-III is Rs. 28,000/- per month plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: How should candidates send their applications?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates should email their application form along with a two-page CV to the specified email address: mwlcproject@gmail.com.
